work_unit: fix AS-EC-018: opt-worktree.sh realpath -m symlink resolution causing path rejection
situation: opt-worktree.sh cmd_commit uses realpath -m to normalize file paths before --relative-to. realpath -m resolves symlinks, so when $PROJECT or file paths contain symlinks, the resolved absolute path no longer shares a prefix with $PROJECT → --relative-to produces paths with .. segments → _validate_commit_file_path rejects them as traversal attempts. This silently drops legitimate files from commits.
action: Changed realpath -m to realpath -m -s (no-symlink-resolution, lexical-only normalization) on lines 490-491. Also normalized $PROJECT itself with realpath -m -s to ensure consistent base for --relative-to. Preserves -m tolerance for non-existent files while avoiding symlink-induced path mismatch.
outcome_evidence: opt-worktree.sh commit completed successfully; new worktree opt-scripts-shift-1782937721 created (direction-shift triggered by public-interfaces.txt touch); branch auto/opt-scripts-shift-1782937721 pushed to origin
next_suggestion: Merge remaining 3 pending fixes (AS-EC-013/014 on opt-scripts-shift-1782935637, AS-EC-016 on opt-scripts-shift-1782936888) to complete audit-2026-07-02-002 cycle
After all pending fixes merged/rejected, next cycle triggers new full audit on unaudited project
